array.string: set -euo pipefail /opt/homebrew/bin/docker pull opsmode/k8s-janus-runner:latest /opt/homebrew/bin/docker rm -f janus-runner 2>/dev/null || true /opt/homebrew/bin/docker run --rm \ --name janus-runner \ --restart=unless-stopped \ -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \ -v /tmp/.buildx-cache:/tmp/.buildx-cache \ -e GITHUB_OWNER_REPO=opsmode/k8s-janus \ -e GITHUB_PAT="__REPLACE_WITH_PAT__" \ -e RUNNER_NAME=janus-runner-local \ -e RUNNER_LABELS=self-hosted,linux,x64 \ opsmode/k8s-janus-runner:latest
